responseMessageContents.text: The user wants me to display the environment widget again since it didn't come through the first time, and they've confirmed they don't need OpenAI integration.I've provided the form again for you to fill in the two keys.

envs.name: AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
envs.description: Vercel AI Gateway API key — vercel.com → your team → AI Gateway → API Keys → Create Key. Paste ONLY the key value, nothing else.

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key — dashboard.render.com → Account Settings → API Keys → Create API Key. Needed so I can bind the new AI key to the live service and trigger the deploy. Paste ONLY the key.

input.reason: Re-sharing the request: the production AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is rejected as Unauthenticated by the Vercel AI Gateway, so the owner AI chat cannot answer. A fresh Vercel AI Gateway key plus your Render API key lets me update the live service env var and deploy the fix end to end.

requestedEnvs.name: AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
requestedEnvs.description: Vercel AI Gateway API key — vercel.com → your team → AI Gateway → API Keys → Create Key. Paste ONLY the key value, nothing else.
